test-case.name: DiagnosticsExport_IsNonEmptyAndEvidenceFree
test-case.output: ShadowGuidedStoryPlayer: no snapshots assigned FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — A decision seals into a hash-chained, signed provenance chain. ANALYTICAL_CORRECTNESS: NOT_EVALUATED DIGITAL_SIGNATURE: VERIFIED EXTERNAL_ANCHOR: NOT_PRESENT HASH_CHAIN: VERIFIED PROFILE: VERIFIED RECORD_INTEGRITY: VERIFIED SOURCE_RESOLUTION: NOT_PRESENT FIXTURE · DESKTOP MOCK · DEVICE VALIDATION PENDING Audit chain: integrity, not correctness — A decision seals into a hash-chained, signed provenance chain. test-case.name: HandleAction_StepsAndResets
